title: Department Manager Vacancy at Pantaloons Ventures Solutions - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Department Manager Vacancy at Pantaloons Ventures Solutions - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Pantaloons Ventures Solutions invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Department Manager at our Aurangabad location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Pantaloons Ventures Solutions:
Pantaloons Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Category Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Life and accident insurance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Aurangabad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Pantaloons Ventures Solutions!
